serviceNotes.engine oil: OM647 five-cylinder diesel: flexible ASSYST up to 25,000 km / 12 months where equipped; rec 15,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.

serviceSources.engine oil: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU & ASSYST PLUS — maximum indicated Oil Service up to 25,000 km / 12 months for OM647 CDI. Tier 2 https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (OM611 E 220 CDI proxy) lists 10,000 km fixed — W211 ASSYST uses higher ceiling; follow ASSYST display.
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211/S211) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — OM647 five-cylinder CDI air filter 60,000 km / 48 months (inspection table)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-Benz W211 EU maintenance booklet — inspect brake lining thickness at regular service intervals (~30,000 km orientation)
serviceSources.fuel filter: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service — diesel fuel filter 60,000 km (W210/W211 CDI proxy)
serviceSources.coolant: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — long-life coolant ~150,000 km orientation
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: Manual gearbox oil preventive ~100,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil preventive ~60,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km — specialist preventive
